doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No such EAJP-2025 protocol exists in verified State Bar of California publications, and its purported UPL waiver for unsupervised paralegal practice contradicts California's established unauthorized practice rules under B&P §6125.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol (EAJP-2025)" exists in the State Bar of California's published rules or Legal Services Trust Fund Commission materials, and the document's core provision—waiving UPL liability under B&P §6125 for paralegals acting without pre-filing attorney review—contradicts California's established unauthorized practice framework, making this almost certainly a fabricated document.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such EAJP-2025 protocol exists in verified State Bar of California publications, and its purported UPL waiver for unsupervised paralegal practice contradicts California's established unauthorized practice rules under B&P §6125.
